title: Key Management
description: This page displays API key information for all accounts, including usage and expiration time. You can create new keys for specific accounts by clicking the 'Add Key' button in the upper right corner or the '+' button next to each key item. Please keep your API keys safe and avoid leaking them to others
pleaseSelectFirst: Please select an account first to view key list

managedSiteStatus.pageUnsupported: Managed-site channel checks are unavailable on this page because Veloera does not currently support searching channels by URL.

descriptions.exactKeyMatch: Matched by exact key and exact model set under the same normalized base URL.
descriptions.secondaryExactModelsMatch: Secondary match found by exact model-set comparison. Review the matched channel before treating it as confirmed.
descriptions.secondaryModelsContainedMatch: Secondary match found by model containment. Review the matched channel before treating it as confirmed.
descriptions.secondaryModelsSimilarMatch: Secondary match found by model similarity. Review the matched channel before treating it as confirmed.
descriptions.keyMatchedModelsMismatch: A channel under the same normalized URL bucket matched the key, but the model set did not match.
descriptions.keyMatchedModelsDrifted: The same channel matched the key, but the model set only matched approximately and still needs manual review.
descriptions.keyModelsConflict: Key and model checks both found candidates, but they point to different channels and need manual review.
descriptions.fuzzyUrlOnlyMatch: Only a fuzzy URL-level match was found. Review the matched channel before treating it as confirmed.
descriptions.noMatch: Exact verification completed without finding any exact, secondary, or fuzzy channel match.
descriptions.configMissing: Configure managed-site admin credentials before checks can run.
descriptions.inputPreparationFailed: Verification could not prepare comparable channel inputs.
descriptions.exactVerificationUnavailable: Exact key verification is unavailable, and no secondary or fuzzy channel match was found.
descriptions.newApiRetrieveKeyHint: For New API, full key comparison depends on the channel key, and viewing that channel key itself requires 2FA verification, so full key comparison is currently unavailable.
descriptions.veloeraBaseUrlSearchUnsupported: This feature is not supported on Veloera because Veloera does not support base URL search for channel lookup.
descriptions.backendSearchFailed: Managed-site checks could not be completed.

url.tooltipMatched: Found {{count}} candidate channel(s) under the same normalized URL bucket. Example candidate: {{channelName}}.
url.tooltipNoMatch: No channel was found under the same normalized URL bucket.

key.tooltipMatched: A channel under the same normalized URL bucket matched this key: {{channelName}}.
key.tooltipNoMatch: Comparable channel keys were available, but none matched this key.
key.tooltipUnavailable: Key comparison could not be completed because comparable channel keys were unavailable.
key.tooltipNotProvided: No comparable key was available for this token.

models.tooltipExact: The normalized model set exactly matched channel {{channelName}}.
models.tooltipContained: The normalized model set matched channel {{channelName}} by containment.
models.tooltipSimilar: The normalized model set matched channel {{channelName}} by similarity ({{score}}%).
models.tooltipNoMatch: No model match was confirmed inside the normalized URL bucket.
models.tooltipUnavailable: Model comparison could not be completed because no comparable URL bucket was available.
models.tooltipNotProvided: No comparable model list was available for this token.

recovery.verificationRequired: Full key comparison first needs a short-lived New API verification step, because viewing a New API channel key itself requires 2FA.
recovery.configureLogin: Add the New API login and 2FA-assist fields in Settings first. Until then, the channel key cannot be read and full key comparison cannot be completed.

repairMissingKeys.title: Ensure at least one key
repairMissingKeys.description: Scan stored accounts and create a default key for any eligible account with no keys, ensuring each eligible account has at least one key.
repairMissingKeys.runningNote: This job runs in the background. Closing this dialog will not cancel it.
repairMissingKeys.searchPlaceholder: Search account, origin, or site type...

messages.saveToApiProfilesFailed: Failed to save to API profiles
messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete key {{name}}? This action cannot be undone
messages.deleteFailed: Failed to delete key, please try again later

dialog.warningText: Please keep API keys safe and avoid leaking
dialog.ipPlaceholder: Leave empty for no limit, separate multiple IPs with commas
dialog.ipExample: Example: 192.168.1.1,10.0.0.1 or use * for no limit
dialog.groupRestrictedNote: Only groups compatible with this model are selectable.
dialog.editModeNoChange: Cannot change account in edit mode
dialog.updateFailed: Failed to update key, please try again later
dialog.createFailed: Failed to create key, please try again later
dialog.loadDataFailed: Failed to load data, please try again later
dialog.validExpiration: Expiration time must be greater than current time
dialog.validIp: Please enter valid IP addresses, separate multiple IPs with commas
